channel.title: NRIBeat — Daily Pulse for Indian Americans
channel.description: Immigration, AI, Cricket, Bollywood, and Layoffs — curated daily for the Indian-American community.

item.title: Coetzee Replaces Injured Payne at SRH in IPL 2026
item.description: SRH brings in Coetzee to replace injured David Payne for IPL 2026, marking the third overseas seamer replacement this season. The franchise is facing a major injury crisis but hopes for Pat Cummins' quick return to stabilize their bowling attack.

item.title: India Cricket Score: Rodrigues on T20I Loss to South Africa
item.description: India's T20I loss to South Africa exposed execution gaps in death overs, but Jemimah Rodrigues is determined to lead a comeback. The series is still very much alive—watch for India cricket highlights on Willow TV and catch the next match with NRIBeat's complete coverage.

item.title: New Zealand's Foxcroft Shines in Bangladesh ODI 2026
item.description: New Zealand's Dean Foxcroft proved he belongs in international cricket with a composed 59-run innings in his second ODI against Bangladesh in Dhaka. Young players demonstrating such adaptability in subcontinental conditions are building the next generation of international cricketers—comparable to talent emerging from the IPL 2025 franchise circuit. For US-based India cricket fans, Foxcroft's performance is a reminder that ODI cricket rewards tactical thinking and condition awareness as much as raw batting talent.

item.title: April 2026 Visa Bulletin: EB-2 India Final Action Date Holds Steady to July 15, 2014
item.description: April 2026 Visa Bulletin: EB-2 India Final Action Date holds steady to July 15, 2014; EB-3 India to November 15, 2013. Dates for Filing: EB-2 January 15, 2015, EB-3 January 15, 2015. No movement this month — monitor the next bulletin closely.

item.title: Vipul Amrutlal Shah Wins 16-Year Legal Battle Over London Dreams
item.description: Filmmaker Vipul Amrutlal Shah wins 16-year cheque bounce case tied to 2009 film London Dreams after court judgment April 15, 2026. This landmark victory strengthens protections for Bollywood creators and signals improved accountability in Hindi film financing—important context for diaspora audiences following new Bollywood movies and streaming releases.

item.title: AI Won't Replace Your Thinking—But Will Atrophy It [2026]
item.description: Dani Rodrik warns that AI's real threat isn't job replacement—it's cognitive atrophy. Indian engineers in the US who use AI thoughtfully (understanding why, not just copying) will protect and advance their careers. Those who outsource their thinking to AI will become interchangeable with a subscription.

item.title: Pati Patni Aur Woh Do 2026: Zee Studios & T-Series Team Up
item.description: Zee Studios and T-Series have partnered for the first time to release 'Pati Patni Aur Woh Do' in 2026, a highly-anticipated comedy sequel. The film will premiere theatrically before streaming on OTT platforms (likely ZEE5), making it essential viewing for Bollywood fans in the USA.

item.title: Claude Mythos: Anthropic's AI Tool Changes ChatGPT Alternatives in 2026
item.description: Anthropic launched Claude Mythos Preview on April 7, 2026, reshaping the ChatGPT alternatives landscape. Indian tech professionals adopting this AI tool for developers gain productivity advantages that directly impact machine learning salary negotiations and promotion cycles in 2026.

item.title: MI's Clinical Edge Problem: Jayawardene on IPL 2025 Struggles
item.description: Mahela Jayawardene reveals Mumbai Indians lack the clinical execution of competitors in IPL 2025, with Jasprit Bumrah's rare wicketless stretch highlighting how fine the margins are in modern T20 cricket. MI's path forward depends on decisive execution, not just talent.

item.title: ICC Women's Challenge Trophy 2026: India Cricket Schedule
item.description: India heads to Rwanda for the inaugural ICC Women's Challenge Trophy starting April 18, 2026, facing off against USA, Nepal, Italy, and Vanuatu. For US-based Indian cricket fans, this is a perfect opportunity to catch India cricket scores without crazy early morning alarm times. NRIBeat has your complete guide to watch live, including streaming options and match schedules.

item.title: Bangladesh vs New Zealand Cricket 2026: Live Score & Highlights
item.description: Bangladesh's experienced squad faces a weakened New Zealand team missing IPL and PSL-bound players in Dhaka. The home advantage, pitch conditions, and depth give Bangladesh the edge. For US-based cricket fans, Willow TV and cricket.com offer live coverage—though early morning starts are the trade-off. This series is crucial preparation for both teams ahead of the ICC Champions Trophy 2025.

item.title: Krishnavataram Part 1: The Heart – New Mythological OTT Release 2025
item.description: Sanskruti Jayana debuts in Krishnavataram Part 1: The Heart, a new mythological OTT release available on Disney+ Hotstar. This is a must-watch for Indian diaspora seeking quality Bollywood content with cultural depth and impressive production value on streaming platforms this week.

item.title: ChatGPT's Failed NFL Draft Shows AI Limits for Tech Professionals [2026]
item.description: ChatGPT's catastrophic NFL draft shows AI tools are pattern matchers, not infallible experts. For Indian tech pros, this means: use ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini for velocity, but verify outputs in high-constraint domains. Engineers who audit AI tools responsibly will earn more than those who trust AI blindly.

item.title: MI Signs Krish Bhagat to Replace Injured Ankolekar | IPL 2026
item.description: Mumbai Indians have signed Punjab seamer Krish Bhagat as an injury replacement for Atharva Ankolekar ahead of IPL 2026, betting on raw talent over T20 experience. For Indian diaspora fans in the US tracking India cricket, this could signal the emergence of a new bowling star. Expect Bhagat to feature in early MI matches—follow NRIBeat for live updates and post-match analysis.

item.title: Khaleel Ahmed Out IPL 2026: Quadriceps Injury Impact
item.description: Fast bowler Khaleel Ahmed is out of IPL 2026 due to a quadriceps injury suffered during CSK's match against KKR. The injury raises concerns about his availability for the ICC Champions Trophy 2025 and impacts Chennai Super Kings' bowling depth during the tournament.

item.title: Cricket Australia BBL Privatisation Pause: What Indian Fans Need to Know
item.description: Cricket Australia's BBL privatisation plan is facing serious resistance from major state cricket boards. NSW wants a pause, and Queensland is undecided—a significant setback for the restructuring plan. This matters to Indian cricket fans because it shows how tricky domestic league reforms are, even in established cricket nations.

item.title: Kartik Aaryan's Naagzilla Postponed to Valentine's 2027
item.description: Kartik Aaryan's fantasy-comedy Naagzilla has been rescheduled from August 2026 to Valentine's Day 2027 by Dharma Productions. The film will release in US theatres during the romantic weekend before hitting Netflix and Prime Video approximately 4-6 weeks later, giving Indian diaspora another major Bollywood release to anticipate in 2027.

item.title: Toaster Netflix April 2025: Rajkummar Rao New Movie
item.description: Toaster, a quirky new Bollywood comedy starring Rajkummar Rao and Sanya Malhotra, premiered on Netflix April 15, 2025. The film features hilarious cameos from Farah Khan and Pratik Gandhi and marks the lead couple's production debut. Stream it now on Netflix in the US with your existing subscription.

item.title: LSG Unleashes Match-Ready Mayank vs RCB in IPL 2026
item.description: LSG's young speedster Mayank Yadav is finally ready for his IPL 2026 debut against RCB after weeks of careful conditioning. This is a major turning point for both the franchise and Indian cricket fans watching from the US, marking the arrival of a potentially game-changing talent in the tournament.

item.title: IPL 2026 Purple Cap Race: Kamboj Levels Prasidh at Top
item.description: IPL 2026 is hitting peak excitement! Kamboj has matched Prasidh's wicket count to lead the Purple Cap race after Match 22, while a new face has cracked the Orange Cap top 5. If you're catching India cricket live scores from the US, this mid-tournament reshuffle means the race for individual awards—and playoff spots—is completely open. Follow Willow TV for live coverage.
